name: logging design: the analysis stack alternatives are explained in plain business language so the user can choose
command:
printf '{"platform":"aws","iac_targets":["terraform"]}' > h.json
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/toolchain-advisor.sh" --handoff h.json --out tc.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const t=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("tc.json","utf8"));const alts=t.recommendations.find(r=>r.category==="observability").alternatives;process.exit(alts.length>=4&&alts.every(a=>typeof a.plain==="string"&&a.plain.length>10)&&alts.some(a=>a.tool==="amazon-cloudwatch"&&a.platform_native)?0:1)' && echo plain-analysis 1>&2
